name: sysSetVariableFilterActive
title: sysSetVariableFilterActive
syntax: long sysSetVariableFilterActive(dword active, char filterName[]); // form 2
description: Activates or deactivates a variable filter. If no filterName is given, the default filter is affected.

parameters.name: active
parameters.description: Specifies the new filter status: 0: deactivated. All other values: activated.

parameters.name: Note An empty filterName refers to the default filter and can be omitted completely.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
